---
name: Feature request / new route
about: Propose a new source route, stage improvement, or script feature
labels: enhancement
---

**What should the skill handle that it currently does not?**
<!-- Most wanted: a source that blocks the generic cascade plus the route that works. Also welcome: stage improvements, script flags, doc gaps. -->

**If this is a new source route:**
- URL pattern (e.g. `*.substack.com/p/*`):
- What the existing stages return (403 / CAPTCHA / empty):
- The route that works, as concretely as you can describe it:
- When you last verified it:

**Anything you can contribute yourself?**
<!-- A PR, a tested snippet, ongoing verification? No is a fine answer. -->
